# Project Guidelines

## Code Style
- No language-specific style is defined yet.
- Match the style and formatter configuration used by the first established code in this repository.

## Architecture
- This workspace is currently empty. No architecture or component boundaries are defined yet.
- After source files are added, prefer updating this file with links to architecture docs instead of embedding long explanations.

## Build and Test
- No build, lint, or test commands are configured yet.
- Before running commands, detect project tooling from manifest files (for example, package.json, pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, Makefile) and use those commands.

## Conventions
- Prefer small, focused changes and avoid introducing new frameworks or tooling unless requested.
- If repository docs are added later (README, docs/, CONTRIBUTING), follow and link them here rather than duplicating content.
